feed.title: Fountain Codes: a way to reduce blockchain storage costs

entry.title: Fountain Codes: a way to reduce blockchain storage costs
entry.summary: The email content focuses on the technical details concerning the effective management of anonymity groups within a network. Specifically, it addresses the scenario where there exists N anonymity groups, and the necessity arises to connect with a subset of these groups, quantified as $rN$, where $r$ is less than 1. This setup implies that to maintain or disrupt service, one would have to disable the operations in $(1-r)N+1$ groups rather than just a single group. The discussion extends to the strategic requirement of also targeting any remaining full archival nodes to ensure comprehensive disruption or control. This reflects a strategic approach in network management or cybersecurity aimed at understanding and manipulating group dynamics and node functionalities within a network.
